Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ohk-hannoalps3/

⚠️ This tour has been closed to new registrations due to organizer circumstances.

This tour traverses the spine of the so-called Hanno Alps—the ridge connecting Izu-ga-take to Tenranzan—over 4 separate outings. Part 3 covers the trek from Agano Station across representative Hanno Alps peaks: Maeita, Odaka-yama, and Tengaku-yama. Lunch features a special bento box from Taira Kuriengen.

【Fee】 ¥7,800 per person (includes guide, lunch, and insurance)

【Capacity】 10 people

【Guide】 Akira Shimizu – Japanese Alpine Guide Association-certified mountain guide, Stage II

【What to bring】 Gloves, drinking water, hat, rain gear, snacks, towel
location: 集合 西武池袋線・秩父線「吾野駅」駅前広場
summary: 📋 Registration closed: Hiking guide tour – Hanno Alps full traverse part 3 (Agano Station to Maeita, Odaka, and Tengaku mountains to Higashi-Agano Station)
